title: paniopsis foetida
intro: Paniopsis foetida, also known as stinking Benjamin or paniopsis, is a plant species in the genus Paniopsis, which is a type of fungus belonging to the family Pyronemataceae. It is known for its unique ability to produce a strong, unpleasant odor when its fruiting bodies are injured or handled. The medicinal properties of Paniopsis foetida lie in its antifungal and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Paniopsis foetida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully explore its potential health benefits.
